name: FreelanceOS Lead Capture
description: Capture Instagram leads directly into your FreelanceOS pipeline
__testing_checklist_comment: [ ] Extension icon is active (not grayed out) on instagram.com/username/ pages
[ ] Extension icon is grayed out on all non-Instagram pages
[ ] Popup shows NOT_INSTAGRAM message on instagram.com/explore/ and feed pages
[ ] Popup shows profile data correctly on a public profile page
[ ] Profile with no bio \u2192 bio field empty but no crash
[ ] Profile with external website link \u2192 hasWebsite shows "yes"
[ ] Profile with only WhatsApp/Facebook link \u2192 hasWebsite shows "no"
[ ] Adding a new lead \u2192 appears in FreelanceOS Leads page with stage "Found"
[ ] Adding a duplicate lead \u2192 shows DUPLICATE state with current stage
[ ] Invalid API key \u2192 shows human-readable error
[ ] FreelanceOS offline \u2192 shows "Can't reach FreelanceOS" message
[ ] Settings save correctly persists across popup close/reopen
[ ] Test Connection in options \u2192 shows success/failure clearly
[ ] Recent leads list shows last 10 added leads in options page
